name: Aiseki Shokudou
overview: A show where celebrities travel across Japan, visiting local eateries and interacting with people. The hosts, comedy duo Chidori, watch the footage in a studio and provide humorous commentary, often pausing the video to make jokes or observations.

trailers.title: 【相席食堂】巨乳まんだら王国。教祖イコマノリユキの相席旅　ナイトinナイト
